text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, September 21. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
